glmassume 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Diagnosing GLMs with glmassume

Package index

Goodness of Fit

Test and visualize model calibration

hoslem_test()
Hosmer-Lemeshow Goodness-of-Fit Test
plot_hoslem()
Plot Hosmer-Lemeshow Goodness-of-Fit

Assumption Diagnostics

Check GLM assumptions visually

plot_linearity_link()
Plot Linearity of the Link Function
plot_linearity_logit()
Plot Linearity of the Logit (Deprecated)
plot_residuals()
Plot Residual Diagnostics
plot_vif()
Plot Variance Inflation Factors

Dispersion & Overdispersion

Test and diagnose dispersion

dispersion_test()
Dispersion Test
overdispersion_test()
Overdispersion Test

Count-Model Diagnostics

Diagnostics for Poisson and negative binomial models

plot_rootogram()
Plot Rootogram for Count Models
plot_zero_inflation()
Plot Zero-Inflation Diagnostic

Influential Observations

Identify observations with outsized influence

plot_influence()
Plot Influential Observations

All-in-One

Family-aware combined diagnostic panel

diagnose_glm()
Diagnose GLM Assumptions
